ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the quiz belongs to */,
  "quiz_name" TEXT /* Name of the quiz */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quiz */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the quiz */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the quiz was created */,
  "quiz_type" TEXT /* Type of the quiz (e.g., practice, exam, homework) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the quiz in minutes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quiz is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the quiz can be started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the quiz ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the course starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the course ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "option_a" TEXT /* Option A for the question */,
  "option_b" TEXT /* Option B for the question */,
  "option_c" TEXT /* Option C for the question */,
  "option_d" TEXT /* Option D for the question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer for the question */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the question (1-5) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false, essay) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the question belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the question was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the question was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES question_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor is currently active */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor was hired */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the instructor's record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is currently active */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the student's record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the attempt */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz being attempted */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date the attempt was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student on the attempt */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quiz attempt is completed */,
  "time_spent_minutes" INTEGER /* Time spent on the quiz in minutes */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attempt has been reviewed by the instructor */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_attempts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_attempts_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the option is correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_questions" (
  "quiz_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz-question relationship */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_attempts_questions" (
  "attempt_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt-question relationship */,
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz attempt */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "student_answer" TEXT /* Student's answer to the question */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student's answer is correct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_attempts_questions_attempt_id FOREIGN KEY ("attempt_id") REFERENCES quiz_attempts ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_attempts_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
